description_long: This object is a stylized, pixelated handgun with a blocky, retro appearance reminiscent of classic video game graphics. The main body is predominantly black, with a prominent purple rectangular section suggesting the cylinder or slide. The barrel is short and thick, ending in a bright red, circular muzzle that stands out sharply against the rest of the design. The grip is integrated into the lower portion of the body, with a simple, angular form and no visible texturing or ergonomic features. The trigger guard is a small, squared-off loop beneath the body, and the overall construction appears solid and monolithic, with no visible seams or moving parts. The color palette is limited, giving the object a bold, easily recognizable silhouette suitable for urban-themed environments.
description: A blocky, pixel-art style handgun with a black body, purple cylinder, and a striking red muzzle. Its simple, angular design and limited color palette evoke a retro video game aesthetic.
description_view_0: The left side view shows the black body, purple cylinder, and the red circular muzzle clearly, with the grip and trigger guard visible below.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the red circular muzzle as the dominant feature, with the black barrel and purple cylinder forming a compact, rounded profile.
description_view_2: The right side view mirrors the left, displaying the black body, purple cylinder, and red muzzle, with the grip and trigger guard visible below.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the back of the handgun, with the purple cylinder and black body forming a rounded, blocky shape and the grip extending downward.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is blocky and angular, seamlessly integrated into the lower portion of the handgun's body. It lacks any visible texturing, finger grooves, or ergonomic contouring, presenting a smooth, flat surface typical of pixel-art designs. There are no logos, embellishments, or decorative elements on the grip, and its appearance is utilitarian and minimalistic.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is a small, squared-off loop beneath the main body, with a simple rectangular profile and no visible reinforcement or texturing. It is proportionally thick and matches the blocky aesthetic of the overall design, lacking any undercuts or integrated accessories.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and thick, ending in a prominent, bright red circular muzzle. It has a uniform, blocky profile with no visible threading, porting, or external features such as compensators. The exterior is smooth and unmarked, consistent with the stylized, pixelated design.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide or any other part of the handgun. The surfaces are plain and unadorned, in keeping with the minimalist, retro aesthetic.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is not distinctly visible or delineated from the grip, suggesting a flush, integrated design with no extension, bevel, flare, or finger rest. The bottom of the grip is flat and featureless, with no logos or texturing present.
